feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to change the name of Table Schema in SAP HANA Database Instance of SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When I created a DB instance at SAP BTP subaccount level then schema name came automatically as "MYSALES_HDI_MYSALES_DB_DEPLOYER_1" (as shown in below screenshot).

I wanted to change the schema name 'TEST_SRP', for the same I have added below code in mta.yaml file.

And then successfully build & deployed the CAP project. But schema name is not changed and at subaccount level for that db instance I have received error as 'Update Failed' (as shown in below screenshot).

How to change the name of any schema related to the db instance. And what are the impact of this name change on existing db tables?

Kindly guide on the same.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to activate a User from User Management of SAP BTP HANA Cloud Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi,

In my SAP BTP HANA Cloud Cockpit --> User & Role management, currently one user is in 'deactivated' state and because of it we are not able to perform CRUD operations on SAP HANA Cloud Tables. Kindly guide me how to activate this user.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to Activate a User created by System SuperUser(_SYS_DI_SU) from SAP HANA Cockpit User Management
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP HANA Cockpit User management, when any new user is created by DBADMIN user, then for that new user I am able to see 'Activate/Deactivate' option. But when any user is created by super user (_SYS_DI_SU) and I have logged in as DBADMIN then I am not able to see that 'Activate' option. I also tried ALTER command from DBADMIN SQL window but it's showing me authorization issue.

Kindly guide how to activate any user created by system user '_SYS_DI_SU'.

(Note - We have observed that when we write a schema name in mta.yaml and then build + deploy the MTA project then that schema as a user is getting created in User Management and there its showing created _SYS_DI_SU and it's in deactivate state.)

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Hana Cloud Certification soon dissapear, why?
entry.content:
Hello, recently i saw that HANA CLOUD certifications will dissappear soon in March, any idea why?
How it will be in the future? 

Thank you,

Best regards,

Ghenadie

entry.title: Unable to connect to HANA Cloud instance throwing Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by pe
entry.content:
While connecting to an standard HANA cloud database from the visual studio code Hana explorer, I am getting below error,

[ERROR] The connection to the database failed with reason: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by peer {0.0.0.0:59250 -> 3.215.33.125:443} (0.0.0.0:59250 -> xxxx.hana.prod-us10.hanacloud.ondemand.com:443))

entry.title: Single HDI container for multiple CAP apps —recommended?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently managing multiple CAP applications catering to different modules. I am contemplating the idea of adopting a centralized approach by creating a single HDI container. Within this container, the plan is to generate separate tables/views for each CAP application What are your thoughts on this approach, and do you have any recommendations or considerations to keep in mind when implementing such a strategy? Or Should we create separate HDI container for each module/CAP application 

Thanks

Somnath

entry.title: Error: Cannot create service instance, there isno database available in Business Application Studio.
entry.content:
Hi BTP Experts!!

When trying to create a new project from template in Business App Studio and after passing all the
default details as per the sap learning tutorial i can see that the new project is been created under explorer,under workspace.

screenshot below:

Now when i try to deploy the database artifact code (as mentioned in sap learning tutorial). It should first create a HDI container and then bound this code to create a physical table. But i am getting below error.

Error: Binding Service DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh failed : Service instance 'DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh' not found: Service instance 'DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh' failed to be created. Error: Service broker error: Service broker hana-broker failed with: Can not create service instance 'DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh': There is no database available. Ensure that you have a database available in space 'dev' within organization '6b16a23etrial'.

How can you assign a database for this dev space under Cloud Foundry (again i see this is deprecate) so it should be the HANA database instance that i created in HANA central (screenshot above).

But how can we assign this database to the dev space.

Can someone guide here

Thanks in Advance.
Mell

entry.title: It's possible to connect SAP HANA CLOUD TRIAL with PowerBi?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I would like to know, if is possible to connect SAP HANA CLOUD TRIAL with PowerBi?
Because I am getting this error, and I don't know what to do.
Failed to save modifications to the server. Error returned: 'Erro do OLE DB ou do ODBC : [DataSource.Error] ODBC: ERROR [S1000] [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB DLL][HDBODBC] General error;258 insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guid '8B6E9BCE5E89814EAF1980EA3B9E59EB'. '.

I'm trying to get the data from a container in Hana, because I have an application in SAP BAS with the SAP Hana

entry.title: OdataV2 based API for creating Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm looking for an ODATA based API for creating Billing document.
we would like to pass sales order to create this billing document.

(we are using S4 HANA public cloud. We are getting data in flat file for creation of BP, SO and Payment details. Using one ODATA based API, we are already creating BP and SO in public cloud)


Thanks in advance
@Dan_Wroblewski  ,@Sriprasadsbhat, @Sookriti_Mishra

entry.title: Monthly basis job and event based job creation in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Customer needs assistance in creating two jobs:

  • 1st job
    • should trigger tasks every month
  • 2nd job
    • In this job, there are 3 tasks and each is interdependent.
    • Once 1st is completed the 2nd should be triggered and when the 2nd is completed the 3rd should be triggered.
    • If any tasks fail then it should not trigger the next one.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to Create Index on Global Temporary Table in SAP HANA cloud sps 04
entry.content:
I'm encountering an issue when attempting to create an index on a global temporary table within SAP HANA. My intention is to enhance the performance of queries that utilize this table, but I've hit a snag with the following error:

Error: (dberror) [7]: feature not supported: Cannot create index on temporary table: GLOBAL_PURCHASING_DOCUMENTS: line 19 col 63 (at pos 62)

The command I attempted to execute was:

CREATE INDEX GLOBAL_PURCHASING_DOCUMENTS ON GLOBAL_PURCHASING_DOCUMENTS(Purchasing_Document_ID);

  1. Is there a workaround or an alternative approach to optimize query performance on  temporary tables in SAP HANA?
  2. Are there best practices for managing large datasets in global temporary tables that might help mitigate the need for an index?
  3. Could this limitation be version-specific, and if so, are there any updates or configurations that might allow for index creation on temporary tables?

I appreciate any insights or recommendations you may have on how to effectively manage and query large temporary tables in SAP HANA.

entry.title: create a table in hana cloud and expose it as a Odata service
entry.content:
I am trying to create a table in SAP HANA CLOUD and expose it as a Odata service so that i can use it on different application.So, please help on this 

 

Thanks for advance help 

@thomas_jung @Shilpa_Shankar @Maksym

entry.title: Getting access to assigned roles for multiple USERs in HANA cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have the following requirement. The application should render data based on  XSUAA roles and the role details of multiple users have to be read from system specific views in HANA CLOUD .Is that possible?

Where can I find this BTP roles assigned to a user in corresponding HANA instance? Are there any specific  HANA cloud system tables to see the details of XSUAA roles. I had tried to get CATALOG READ access and get access to system views (System Views for Verifying Users' Authorization | SAP Help Portal). But this does not have XSUAA related roles. Appreciate the support at the earliest.

Thanks & Regards,

Priya

entry.title: Does HANA Cloud given an option to show timestamp information along with Timezone ?
entry.content:
I have a column that stores timestamp information and timezone information separately and I wanted one more column that gets these two information into one single column

Example : 

Column containing timestamp : 2021-01-28 13:51:55 

Column containing timezone : right/America/North_Dakota/Beulah

The new column should be : 2021-01-28 07:50:55 right/America/North_Dakota/Beulah

I was evaluating UTCTOLOCAL and I see conversion is possible, but not finding a way to show it in the format I want. 

SELECT UTCTOLOCAL('2021-01-28 13:51:55', 'right/America/North_Dakota/Beulah') FROM DUMMY; just returns 2021-01-28 07:50:55 

I also want the timezone information to be added to show. 


I know the concat we can do, but I want to preserve the data type of the new column to timezone but only change the presentation of the timestamp info. 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Journal Entry - Change (Asynchronous) to update CD amount
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to update the CD amount on Journal Entry, and we are using Journal Entry - Change (Asynchronous). to do so. However, I can't see an option to change the CD amount. How can I achieve this?

Journal Entry - Change (Asynchronous).

@SAPSupport : please help.

FIN Treasury FIN Posting and Taxes

entry.title: Sap S/4Hana Cloud Fi Public
entry.content: Hi, if we need to change chart GL accounts,how we can delete Germany chart accounts

entry.title: How can I connect my HDI Container of my SAP Hana Cloud with my SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need help with this problem. I need to extract some data from an HDI Container in my Hana Cloud to use in my PowerBi. However, I cannot access the data because it says I don't have permission. I have already tried to use the SAP Data Datasphere trial. So, here is my question: how can I connect my HDI Container in my SAP Hana Cloud with SAP Data Intelligence? All my accounts are free, so is there some problem? I created this HDI Container with the SAP BAS.

entry.title: Transfer order UB - Missing client but it does exist
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm facing a problem when I make a transfer order with conditions (S4 HANA CLOUD PUBLIC). Everything in the configuration is set and I proceed with the proces

In customizing I create the transfer order (app ME21N) and I'm able to finish the process. But when I try in the QM tenant (test) with the same client's ID I get these errors:

 

Not possible to determine shipping data for material XXX

Please maintain sales org./division/distr. channel in supplying plant XXX

Customer  does not exist (please change entry in plant XXX)

 

The customer master and the material master are OK, they have all the information. I think the error is because theres no transport order for the activity 101926 Define Shipping Data for Plants. In this activity I set the customer 9 and this customer is in both systems, with the exact same information.

 

What can I do to solve this problem?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Partial Clearing in Public Cloud System
entry.content: Hi everyone,Our client has very partial payment procces What can I do to automatize partial clearing in SAP Public Cloud system.

entry.title: Issues when using BAdI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER
entry.content:
We are using BAdI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER to calculate a value for a custom field with data from a work package.

This is causing the billing document to not properly determine billing date (field is empty) and also the sales tax determination in the pricing procedure is not executed correctly (getting a 208 error)

I can add the billing date manually and when re-pricing the document, it determines sales tax correctly.

Any idea what causes this behaviour?

This is the code for the custom logic:

SELECT
SINGLE wbselementinternalid
  FROM i_projectbillingelemententry AS ent
 INNER JOIN i_projectbillingelemententrflw AS flw
    ON flw~projbillgelmntentritmuuid = ent~projbillgelmntentritmuuid
 WHERE flw~projectbillingrequest = @bil_doc_item-referencesddocument
   AND flw~billingdocrequestitemreference = @bil_doc_item-referencesddocumentitem
  INTO @DATA(lv_wbs) PRIVILEGED ACCESS.


SELECT
SINGLE yy1_monthlymax_cpd, yy1_quarterlymax_cpd, yy1_annualmax_cpd
  FROM i_workpackage AS fnl
 INNER JOIN i_wbselementbasicdata AS wbs
    ON  fnl~workpackage = wbs~wbselement
 WHERE wbs~wbselementinternalid = @lv_wbs
  INTO @DATA(ls_thresholds) PRIVILEGED ACCESS.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
  IF  bil_doc_item-billingquantity < ls_thresholds-yy1_monthlymax_cpd.
    bil_doc_item_res-YY1_TOBEBILLED_QTY_BDI = '0'.
  ELSE.
    bil_doc_item_res-YY1_TOBEBILLED_QTY_BDI = bil_doc_item-billingquantity - ls_thresholds-yy1_monthlymax_cpd.
  ENDIF.
  bil_doc_item_res-YY1_TOBEBILLED_QTY_BDIU = bil_doc_item-BASEUNIT.
ENDIF.

SELECT
SINGLE wbselementinternalid
FROM i_projectbillingelemententry AS ent
INNER JOIN i_projectbillingelemententrflw AS flw
ON flw~projbillgelmntentritmuuid = ent~projbillgelmntentritmuuid
WHERE flw~projectbillingrequest = @bil_doc_item-referencesddocument
AND flw~billingdocrequestitemreference = @bil_doc_item-referencesddocumentitem
INTO @DATA(lv_wbs) PRIVILEGED ACCESS.


SELECT
SINGLE yy1_monthlymax_cpd, yy1_quarterlymax_cpd, yy1_annualmax_cpd
FROM i_workpackage AS fnl
INNER JOIN i_wbselementbasicdata AS wbs
ON fnl~workpackage = wbs~wbselement
WHERE wbs~wbselementinternalid = @lv_wbs
INTO @DATA(ls_thresholds) PRIVILEGED ACCESS.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
IF bil_doc_item-billingquantity < ls_thresholds-yy1_monthlymax_cpd.
bil_doc_item_res-YY1_TOBEBILLED_QTY_BDI = '0'.
ELSE.
bil_doc_item_res-YY1_TOBEBILLED_QTY_BDI = bil_doc_item-billingquantity - ls_thresholds-yy1_monthlymax_cpd.
ENDIF.
bil_doc_item_res-YY1_TOBEBILLED_QTY_BDIU = bil_doc_item-BASEUNIT.
ENDIF.
